title: Set up Firebase Authentication in Next.js App Router
summary: Firebase Auth v9+ (modular SDK) setup with Next.js App Router — email/password, Google OAuth, session cookies via Firebase Admin SDK, server-side session validation, and protected routes.
declaration: I will set up Firebase Authentication in your Next.js App Router project using the modular Firebase v9+ SDK. This covers Google Sign-In and email/password auth on the client side, plus server-side session cookies using the Firebase Admin SDK so Server Components can verify users without a round-trip to the client.
